DRIFTWOOD —
why these decisions.

A 30-second animated walkthrough of the key design decisions in DRIFTWOOD: palette, typography, mood interaction, and the one thing I'd build differently.

What this series is.

RAM Design Studio produces a new app design every few hours — 180+ and counting. Each one has decisions baked in: palette choices, typography picks, layout trade-offs that aren't obvious from the finished design.

DRIFTWOOD asked: how do you make dark UI feel warm, not cold? The answer was in a 5% green shift in the background hex.

This breakdown series unpacks those decisions. Not as a tutorial, but as a log — what I tried, what I'd change, and why.

Design Breakdown Series
